arts.ttl: Arsenal want Bayern's Kimmich - Saturday's gossip
arts.sum: Arsenal want to sign Joshua Kimmich, Aston Villa have joined the race for Dusan Vlahovic, and Liverpool are willing to listen to offers for Luis Diaz.

arts.ttl: PLAYER RATINGS | VfB Stuttgart 1-3 Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Bayern Munich took a massive step towards the Bundesliga title, beating a defensively poor VfB Stuttgart side 3-1 to go 11 points clear for at least 24 hours. There is…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich overcome VfB Stuttgart's early dominance to claim vital win
arts.sum: Bayern Munich further underlined their title credentials on Matchday 24 thanks to a 3-1 come-from-behind win over VfB Stuttgart, featuring goals from Michael Olise, Leon Goretzka, and Kingsley Coman. Manuel Neuer celebrates after a crucial save, keeping Bayern in the game during Stuttgart's strong start.

arts.ttl: Bayern come from behind to beat Stuttgart
arts.sum: Stuttgart took the lead against Bayern, but ended up losing 1-3 after two big mistakes in the second half.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Kimmich TRUTH as Osimhen interest rekindled
arts.sum: FootballTransfers runs through all the latest Arsenal transfer news, rumours and gossip, including updates on Joshua Kimmich and Victor Osimhen . Arsenal held talks with Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich but have since cooled their interest in signing the Germany international, FootballTransfers understands.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Joshua Kimmich to Arsenal truth revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal held talks with Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich but have since cooled their interest in signing the Germany international, FootballTransfers understands. Sources have subsequently told FootballTransfers that the Gunners are seeking to recruit younger players in that area of the field and are not currently targeting an experienced figure like the Bayern star.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich chief confirms they will try to sign Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz this summer - with Bundesliga giants set to battle Man City for 'the best player in Germany'
arts.sum: Bayern Munich chief Karl-Heinz Rummenigge has announced that his club will target the signing of Bayer Leverkusen's Florian Wirtz this summer.

arts.ttl: VfB Stuttgart vs. Bayern Munich: Live stream, game time thread, odds, prediction, how to watch
arts.sum: In October, Bayern Munich obliterated Stuttgart with a second half hat trick from Harry Kane. For the first time all season, Bayern will be starting the match without Joshua Kimmich.

arts.ttl: How Barcelona & Real Madrid have reacted to news of Joshua Kimmich’s Bayern contract situation
arts.sum: An insight into the stance of the brass at Spanish football’s two biggest clubs when it comes to the potential signing of Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich has been forthcoming…

arts.ttl: Weekend Warm-up: Mythbusters — Bayern Munich is actually the Oprah WInfrey of release clauses; Bundesliga predictions; Throwing it back to AWOLNATION, A final goodbye to Cobra Kai; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich is looking to stay hot and in form against a very good side from VfB Stuttgart before entertaining Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League next week. While it is less than ideal, it is the way of the world and for Bayern Munich to lock down some of these players, a proper release clause was probably not a request, but a requirement.
